scripts.build: esbuild src/main.js --bundle --format=esm --loader:.json=json --outfile=dist/main.js && cp src/index.html src/viewer.css dist/ && cp node_modules/@xterm/xterm/lib/xterm.js node_modules/@xterm/xterm/css/xterm.css node_modules/@xterm/addon-fit/lib/addon-fit.js dist/ && mv dist/addon-fit.js dist/xterm-addon-fit.js
scripts.tauri:build: cd src-tauri && cargo tauri build && bash scripts/rename-bundle-executable.sh
